name: Miraculous Fall
short_description: Miraculous Fall is an exciting 3D Adventure game where players face the consequences of a catastrophic event that has altered the laws of physics. Your task is to carefully descend on various objects to safely return to the ground.
detailed_description:
Miraculous Fall is an exciting 3D Adventure game where players face the consequences of a catastrophic event that has altered the laws of physics.
Your task is to carefully descend on various objects to safely return to the ground.
The game offers a unique gameplay experience full of challenges, where every move you make can lead to unexpected results due to the new rules of reality.

Features:

Survival and Descent
Interactive World
3D Graphics
